nutrition._comment: Worker B computes protein_floor = baseline_protein_floor_g * registry[day_name].multiplier at runtime. Per-meal = protein_floor / meals_per_day. No values hardcoded in scripts.

sleep_settings._comment: Bedtime anchor = target_wake_time - required_duration_hours = 23:00. is_anchor=true injects this block directly into the immutable baseline timeline matrix at Weight 80.

gym_scheduling._comment: is_anchor=false marks gym blocks as flexible Weight-80 dynamic allocations. Worker B gap-scans Worker C's calendar for the first unoccupied 45-min window. scan_policy is a directive string — swappable without code changes.

weekly_template_registry._comment: Keys are full English day names (Monday...Sunday). Worker B resolves the day name from a passed date string via strftime('%A') — no system clock reads, no hardcoded conditionals. Entries with is_anchor=true carry fixed anchor_start/anchor_end coordinates for direct timeline injection, bypassing the gap-scan routine.
